about.title: Meet Your Coach
about.subtitle: Bilingual educator. Russian native. English expert.
about.bio: I'm a native Russian speaker who became fluent in English and French. Over 10+ years, I've coached 500+ professionals — from startup founders to corporate executives — helping them transform their professional communication and unlock global opportunities.
about.bio2: I don't just teach English. I teach the confidence and cultural intelligence that opens doors.
about.creds: CELTA Certified • 10+ Years Corporate Training • 500+ Professionals Coached

testimonials.title: Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Real professionals. Real results.
testimonials.t1_quote: She completely changed my approach to English. I got promoted 6 months after our sessions started.
testimonials.t2_quote: From silent in meetings to confident speaker. This coaching is life-changing.
testimonials.t3_quote: I closed a $2M deal in English after 3 months of coaching. Best investment ever.
